tools.name: mbus.get
tools.description: Gets data from the slave identified by {address}

tools.name: mbus.getMulti
tools.description: Gets data from the slave identified by {address}, and supports multiple responses from the slave

tools.name: mbus.hatOff
tools.description: Turns off power to the M-Bus

tools.name: mbus.hatOn
tools.description: Turns on power to the M-Bus

tools.name: mbus.scan
tools.description: Scan the specified device for slaves

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
